name: Mexican-Style Manicotti
recipeIngredient: 12 oz can whole kernel corn with sweet peppers, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook manicotti shells according to package directions.
2. Meanwhile, in a 1 1/2 quart casserole dish, crumble ground beef and cook, covered, on high (100% power) for 2 1/2 to 3 1/2 minutes or until no pink remains. Drain off fat.
3. Stir in refried beans, celery, and cumin.
4. Fill cooked manicotti shells with meat mixture.
5. Arrange the stuffed shells in a 10x6x2 baking dish.
6. Pour corn and picante sauce over shells.
7. Cover with vented clear plastic wrap.
8. Cook the stuffed shells on high for 8 to 10 minutes or until heated through, giving the dish a half turn once.
9. Spoon sour cream over casserole.
10. Sprinkle with green onions, ripe olives, and chopped tomato.
